_notes.warn_bytes: 30KB in a session — a large document paste. Normal chat messages are 0.5-2KB.
_notes.warn_queries: 20 queries in 10 min — heavy usage, not necessarily bad, just watch.
_notes.critical_bytes: 100KB — multiple large documents or a database dump. Always flag.
_notes.critical_queries: 50 queries in 10 min — automated or bulk submission pattern.

behavior_rules.name: Normal AI usage
behavior_rules.description: Small queries, low frequency. Standard assistant use.

behavior_rules.name: Elevated data volume
behavior_rules.description: Employee is sending large amounts of data to an AI tool. Could be a document, code, or client data.
behavior_rules.message: You've sent a large amount of data to {tool}. If this includes sensitive client information, consider whether this is appropriate.

behavior_rules.name: High-volume data exposure risk
behavior_rules.description: Large data volume suggesting possible document dump, database export, or bulk sensitive data submission.
behavior_rules.message: High-volume data transfer detected to {tool}. Your IT administrator has been notified.

behavior_rules.name: Rapid query burst
behavior_rules.description: Very high query rate suggesting automated or scripted submission.
behavior_rules.message: Unusual activity pattern detected on your connection to {tool}.

behavior_rules.name: Elevated risk tool — lower threshold
behavior_rules.description: Tools with risk_weight above 1.0 (DeepSeek, direct APIs) trigger at lower byte counts.
behavior_rules.message: Data sent to {tool} has been flagged for review due to elevated risk classification.

cooldown._notes: Don't re-alert for the same employee+tool within these windows. Prevents notification spam.

agent_triggers._notes: When true, a critical event automatically dispatches the terminal agent to the employee machine. Requires admin approval by default — set to false to make it autonomous.
